sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5252" key="a)mhxanh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμηχαν-ής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀμήχανος,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg004.perseus-grc1:447" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Merc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">447</biblScope></bibl>, in gen. pl. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-έων</foreign> (but perh. fem. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ος</foreign>).</entryFree>
